questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if TCR competes with any businesses controlled by funds managed or advised by GIM, or any business controlled by funds managed or advised by BlackRock. In your response, please explain whether there are alternatives available, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Global Infrastructure Management and/or TCR.
